name: Vinegar and Cooking Part 2
recipeInstructions:
1. To make your meringue fluffier, beat 3 egg whites with 1 teaspoon of vinegar.
2. Make a sour cream substitute by blending together 1 cup cottage cheese, 1/4 cup milk, and 1 tsp. vinegar.
3. Add 1 tablespoon of vinegar to your deep fryer to eliminate the heavy, greasy taste.
4. For flakier pie crusts, add 1 tablespoon of vinegar to the recipe.
5. To firm up fruit gelatin, add 1 tablespoon of vinegar when preparing.
6. Make buttermilk by adding 1 tablespoon of vinegar to 1 cup of milk. Let it stand for 10 minutes or until thick.
7. Marinate tough cuts of meat or game in a mixture of 1/2 cup vinegar and heated bouillon.
8. For very tough pieces of meat, marinate them in vinegar overnight in the refrigerator.
9. Add 1 teaspoon of vinegar to the cooking water for fluffier rice.
10. To achieve a shiny crust on homemade bread, brush the top with vinegar just before baking is complete, then return to the oven for another few minutes.
